summary: Phase 34 - Verified FastAPI Dependencies for admin permission checks (require_admin_user, require_main_admin). All admin APIs working correctly. Fixed 1 pre-existing return type annotation bug.
critical_code_review_comments: require_admin_user dependency correctly defined at line 25 - checks for admin or sub_admin
require_main_admin dependency correctly defined at line 31 - checks for admin only
Both dependencies used in platform settings endpoints (GET/PUT /api/admin/settings)
76 remaining manual permission checks to be replaced in future phases
Fixed 1 pre-existing return type annotation bug: get_platform_wallet_transactions (-> dict changed to -> list)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 34 refactoring verified: Two new FastAPI dependencies added (require_admin_user, require_main_admin) and used in platform settings endpoints. 76 manual permission checks remain to be replaced in future phases. Fixed 1 return type annotation bug (get_platform_wallet_transactions -> list). All admin APIs tested and working.

require_admin_user.implementation: Checks user_type in ['admin', 'sub_admin'], returns 403 if not
